project_name: Autonomous Claude Paper Trader & Portfolio Analyzer
user_prompt: Build autonomous system: (1) Monthly AI analysis of user's real portfolio for keep/sell recommendations, (2) Fully autonomous paper trading with ₹1L to test if Claude can be trusted with real money. Claude handles all research, trading, and strategy evolution.

features.name: Monthly Portfolio Analysis Engine
features.description: Implement monthly scheduler that analyzes user's real portfolio stocks using Perplexity API. For each stock: fetch fundamentals (P/E, ROE, debt), recent earnings, news sentiment, industry trends. Claude Agent SDK analyzes and provides recommendation: KEEP/SELL with detailed reasoning. Store analysis in portfolio_analysis table. Runs monthly on 1st date.
features.implementation_notes: Implemented complete monthly portfolio analysis with database schema, coordinator, service, and API endpoints. Includes comprehensive test coverage.

features.name: Recommendation Accuracy Tracker
features.description: Track accuracy of KEEP/SELL recommendations over time. For each recommendation: store recommendation_date, symbol, recommendation (KEEP/SELL), stock_price_at_recommendation, follow_up_price_30d, follow_up_price_90d, was_correct (calculated). Monthly accuracy report showing hit rate. Essential for SUCCESS CRITERIA: 'Correct keep/sell recommendations'.
features.notes: New feature to track if Claude's recommendations were correct

features.name: Paper Trading Capital Initialization
features.description: Initialize paper trading account with ₹1,00,000 virtual money in database. Create paper_trading_account table: id, initial_capital, current_capital, created_date, last_updated. Add methods to get_balance, update_balance, get_pnl. No manual deposits/withdrawals - fully autonomous.
features.implementation_notes: PaperTradingAccountManager exists with balance tracking. Table exists in migration but not in base.py schema

features.name: Autonomous Stock Discovery
features.description: Implement autonomous stock discovery for paper trading. Claude uses Perplexity API to research stocks beyond user portfolio: sector analysis, market trends, upcoming IPOs, volatility analysis. Maintain watchlist of potential trades. Update daily based on market conditions. Store in paper_trading_watchlist table.
features.implementation_notes: Fully implemented: Backend with StockDiscoveryService (Perplexity integration, risk scoring, watchlist management), StockDiscoveryCoordinator, and all API endpoints. Frontend with StockDiscoveryCard component integrated into Paper Trading UI.

test_results.notes: Previous AIAutomationControlPanel crash (toFixed on undefined) has been fixed with null coalescing operator (?? 0). Frontend loads successfully on http://localhost:3000. Stock Discovery API endpoints verified working via test_generated_endpoints.py.

features.name: Morning Autonomous Trading Session
features.description: Implement daily morning session (9:00 AM - 9:30 AM): (1) Scan pre-market data, (2) Research selected stocks using Perplexity API, (3) Generate trade ideas, (4) Apply risk safeguards, (5) Execute approved trades via Kite Connect paper trading API, (6) Log all decisions. Fully automated - no human intervention.
features.implementation_notes: Implemented complete morning trading session coordinator with pre-market scanning, Claude AI research via Perplexity, trade idea generation, safeguard validation, and paper trading execution. Includes API endpoints for manual triggering and session history tracking. All decisions logged with full context. Database schema updated to store session results. Bug fix (2025-12-25): Fixed aiosqlite Row to dict conversion in get_morning_sessions() and get_evening_reviews() - replaced dict(row) with {key: row[key] for key in row.keys()}.

bug_fixes.description: Fixed aiosqlite Row to dict conversion bug
Fixed missing row_factory = aiosqlite.Row in DatabaseConnection.initialize()
bug_fixes.root_cause: Database connection was returning tuples instead of Row objects, causing .keys() AttributeError

features.name: Evening Performance Review
features.description: Implement daily evening session (4:00 PM - 4:30 PM): (1) Review executed trades, (2) Calculate daily P&L, (3) Update portfolio performance metrics, (4) Generate trading insights, (5) Store learnings for strategy evolution, (6) Prepare next day's watchlist. Store in daily_performance_reviews table.
features.implementation_notes: Fully implemented evening performance review with daily P&L calculation, AI insights via Perplexity, strategy analysis, watchlist preparation, and complete API endpoints

features.name: Strategy Evolution with Genetic Algorithm
features.description: Implement genetic algorithm for trading strategy evolution: (1) Generate diverse strategies (technical, fundamental, sentiment), (2) Test strategies in paper trading environment, (3) Select top performers by Sharpe ratio, (4) Create new generation through crossover/mutation, (5) Evolve monthly. Store strategy performance in trading_strategies table.
features.notes: StrategyEvolutionEngine exists but genetic algorithm not implemented

features.name: Monthly Performance Evaluation
features.description: Implement comprehensive monthly performance evaluation: (1) Calculate total returns, (2) Risk-adjusted metrics (Sharpe, Sortino), (3) Win rate, (4) Maximum drawdown, (5) Compare with Nifty50 benchmark, (6) Generate performance report, (7) Rate Claude's trading capability (score 0-100). Store in monthly_performance_reports table.
features.notes: No monthly performance evaluation implementation found

features.name: Real-time Price Tracking via Kite Connect
features.description: Integrate Kite Connect API for real-time price data: (1) Stream live prices for paper trading stocks, (2) Historical data for backtesting, (3) Order placement through paper trading mode, (4) Portfolio valuation updates. Ensure trades use real market prices but virtual money. Handle rate limits and API errors gracefully.
features.implementation_notes: KiteConnectService complete with real-time streaming, order placement, mock mode for development

features.name: Trust Score Dashboard
features.description: THE answer to 'Can Claude be trusted with real money?'. Composite score (0-100) based on: (1) Monthly returns consistency, (2) Sharpe ratio > 1.0, (3) Max drawdown < 15%, (4) Win rate, (5) Risk-adjusted performance, (6) Months of positive returns. Score > 85 = trustworthy. Visual dashboard showing score progression over 6+ months.
features.notes: Essential feature - answers THE ultimate question from PURPOSE.md

features.name: Cumulative Drawdown Monitor
features.description: Track cumulative portfolio drawdown (not just daily). Calculate: peak_portfolio_value, current_value, drawdown_percentage, days_in_drawdown. Alert system for approaching 15% max drawdown limit. Historical drawdown chart. SUCCESS CRITERIA: 'Maximum loss < 15%'.
features.implementation_notes: DrawdownMonitor service with 15% safeguard threshold, automatic trading pause, and historical tracking created
features.notes: INFRA-003 has daily circuit breaker but no cumulative tracking

features.name: Nifty50 Benchmark Comparison
features.description: Compare Claude's paper trading performance against Nifty50 benchmark. Track: claude_returns, nifty_returns, alpha (excess returns), beta (correlation), tracking_error. Monthly comparison report. SUCCESS CRITERIA: 'Compare with Nifty50 benchmark'.
features.notes: PT-006 mentions benchmark but needs dedicated service

features.name: Daily Evaluation Database Persistence
features.description: Enable database persistence for daily strategy evaluations by saving to claude_daily_reports table. Tracks: date, portfolio_summary, trade_analysis, learning_insights, confidence_score. Essential for autonomous learning and performance tracking.

features.name: Decision Logging Service
features.description: Create ClaudeDecisionLogger service for autonomous decision tracking: id, timestamp, decision_type (BUY/SELL/HOLD), symbol, reasoning, confidence_score (0-1), context_snapshot (JSON), execution_result (JSON). Essential for transparency and learning.
features.implementation_notes: ClaudeDecisionLogger with full audit trail implemented

features.name: Trade Execution Safeguards
features.description: Create autonomous_trading_safeguards.py with risk limits: (1) Max 5 trades/day, (2) Max 5% position size, (3) Min 0.7 confidence score, (4) Daily loss circuit breaker at ₹10,000, (5) 24-hour symbol cooldown. Autonomous but safe trading.
features.implementation_notes: AutonomousTradingSafeguards with circuit breakers and position limits

features.name: Perplexity API Integration
features.description: Replace stubbed _generate_strategy_ideas() in strategy_evolution_engine.py. Query Perplexity API for: (1) Stock fundamentals, (2) Earnings analysis, (3) News sentiment, (4) Industry trends, (5) Market research. Score and filter results (min 0.6 threshold). Essential for autonomous research.
features.implementation_notes: PerplexityClient integrated into StrategyEvolutionEngine. StockDiscoveryService using Perplexity for market research.

features.name: Event-Driven Architecture
features.description: Implement EventBus system for loose coupling between components. Events: MORNING_SESSION_COMPLETE, EVENING_REVIEW_COMPLETE, TRADE_EXECUTED, SAFEGUARD_TRIGGERED, DECISION_LOGGED. Async event handlers with proper error handling.
features.implementation_notes: Full EventBus implementation with async handlers

features.name: Dependency Injection Container
features.description: DI container for service management with lifetime scopes (singleton, transient). Automatic dependency resolution with circular reference detection. Service registry for runtime discovery.
features.implementation_notes: Full DI container with lifetime management

features.name: Coordinator-Based Architecture
features.description: 70+ coordinators for different domains: portfolio, trading, AI, data fetching, scheduling. Each coordinator limited to 150 lines with single responsibility. Async/await throughout.

features.name: Three-Queue System
features.description: Async queue system: PORTFOLIO_SYNC (portfolio operations), DATA_FETCHER (market data), AI_ANALYSIS (Claude tasks). Parallel processing, 20 max capacity, sequential tasks within queue. Prevents token exhaustion.

features.name: Database State Management
features.description: Locked state methods to prevent database locks. All database operations through config_state.store_*() methods. Automatic retry on lock conflicts. Connection pooling with proper cleanup.

features.name: Background Scheduler
features.description: BackgroundScheduler for periodic tasks: news fetching, earnings updates, portfolio sync, strategy evaluation. Cron-like scheduling with persistent job storage. Error handling and retry logic.

features.name: WebSocket Real-time Updates
features.description: WebSocket connection manager for real-time UI updates. Broadcast trade executions, price updates, performance metrics. Connection health monitoring with automatic reconnection.

features.name: API Security Layer
features.description: JWT authentication, rate limiting, CORS configuration. API key management for external services. Request validation and sanitization. Security middleware with audit logging.

features.name: Error Handling & Logging
features.description: Structured error handling with custom exception types. Comprehensive logging with levels, rotation, and structured JSON output. Error tracking with correlation IDs.

features.name: Configuration Management
features.description: Dynamic configuration with feature flags. Environment-based config with validation. Hot reload for non-critical settings. Secure secret management.

features.name: Database Migrations
features.description: Alembic-based migration system with version control. Automatic rollback on failure. Seed data management. Migration validation before application start.

features.name: Claude Agent SDK Integration
features.description: Integration with Claude Agent SDK via MCP. Proper error handling and timeout management. Session management and context preservation. Async client implementation.

features.name: Health Monitoring System
features.description: Comprehensive health checks: database connectivity, API endpoints, queue status, coordinator health. Metrics collection and alerting. Dashboard integration.

features.name: Database Schema Management
features.description: Comprehensive database schema with proper indexes. Audit columns on all tables. Foreign key constraints. JSON columns for flexible data storage.

features.name: Testing Infrastructure
features.description: pytest framework with fixtures for database state management. Mock services for external APIs. Integration test helpers. Test data factories.

features.name: Dashboard UI
features.description: Main dashboard with portfolio overview, performance metrics, quick actions, AI insights. Real-time updates via WebSocket. Responsive design with dark mode support.

features.name: Paper Trading UI
features.description: Complete paper trading interface: account overview, positions, trade history, order placement, P&L charts. Real-time price updates. Trade execution with safeguards visualization.

features.name: AI Transparency Components
features.description: Decision audit trail display: reasoning, confidence scores, context snapshots. Strategy reflection viewer. Session transcripts with full context. Performance impact analysis.

features.name: News & Earnings Dashboard
features.description: News aggregation with sentiment analysis. Earnings calendar with impact analysis. Fundamental data viewer. Stock-specific news filtering. AI-powered news summary.

features.name: System Health Monitoring
features.description: Real-time system health display: queue status, database connections, API response times, error rates. Resource usage metrics. Alert notifications. Health history trends.

features.name: Initial Setup Configuration UI
features.description: Initial system setup panel (one-time configuration): API credentials (Kite Connect, Perplexity), database connection settings. NO runtime trading parameter changes allowed - system operates autonomously after setup.
features.implementation_notes: Initial setup only - no runtime intervention. Feature flags and scheduler config removed to maintain autonomy.
features.scope_restriction: Initial setup only. No trading parameter changes after system starts.

features.name: Agent Observation UI
features.description: Agent monitoring interface (observation only): agent status display, performance metrics viewer, communication logs. NO task assignment or runtime agent management - purely for observing Claude's autonomous decisions.
features.implementation_notes: Observation-only dashboard. Task assignment and agent creation features removed to maintain autonomy.
features.scope_restriction: Observation only. No manual intervention capabilities.

features.name: Portfolio Analysis UI
features.description: Portfolio analysis viewer: holdings breakdown, sector allocation, performance attribution, risk metrics. Comparison with benchmarks. Historical performance charts.

features.name: Responsive Design Framework
features.description: Mobile-responsive design with touch support. Dark/light theme toggle with system preference detection.
features.implementation_notes: Responsive UI framework - PWA/offline removed (requires live market data)

features.name: Real-time Charting
features.description: Interactive charts with real-time data: candlestick charts, volume indicators, technical overlays. Customizable timeframes. Chart annotations and drawing tools.

features.name: Market Data Service
features.description: Real-time and historical market data from Kite Connect: price feeds, volume data, OHLCV, market depth. Data normalization and storage. Cache management for performance.

features.name: News Aggregation Service
features.description: News aggregation from multiple sources with deduplication. Sentiment analysis integration. News categorization and tagging. Real-time news processing pipeline.

features.name: Fundamental Analysis Service
features.description: Fundamental data collection: P/E ratios, ROE, debt ratios, growth metrics. Financial statement analysis. Industry comparison benchmarks. Data quality validation.

features.name: Earnings Data Service
features.description: Earnings calendar with quarterly results tracking. Surprise analysis vs estimates. Historical earnings data storage. Earnings impact prediction.

features.name: Technical Indicators Service
features.description: Technical analysis indicators: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, moving averages. Custom indicator support. Real-time indicator calculation. Signal generation.

features.name: Autonomous System Integration Tests
features.description: Create comprehensive tests for autonomous systems: (1) Monthly portfolio analysis flow, (2) Paper trading daily sessions, (3) Strategy evolution algorithm, (4) Performance calculation accuracy, (5) API integration reliability. Use pytest fixtures for database state management. Ensure no manual intervention required.

features.name: Real-time WebSocket Manager
features.description: Simple WebSocket for real-time UI updates: live quotes, position updates, order confirmations. Single-user design with automatic reconnection.
features.implementation_notes: Simplified WebSocket for single-user - enterprise scale removed

features.name: System Health Alert System
features.description: System health monitoring alerts only: API connectivity issues, database errors, queue backlogs, service failures. NO trading action alerts (price movements, rebalancing needs) that could tempt manual intervention. User observes monthly performance, not real-time trading.
features.implementation_notes: System health alerts only. Trading event alerts removed to maintain autonomous operation without user intervention.
features.scope_restriction: System health only. No trading-related alerts that could encourage intervention.

features.name: Single Claude Context with Tools
features.description: Claude operates in single context with access to all tools (technical analysis, fundamentals, risk management). No multi-agent overhead - Claude reasons holistically. MCP server provides tool access for market data, trading, and analysis.
features.implementation_notes: Consolidated from multi-agent to single Claude context. Simpler, more effective.

features.name: Claude SDK Integration
features.description: Core Claude Agent SDK integration: client manager with error handling, retry logic, and rate limiting. Context builder for market/portfolio data. Response validation with safeguards check.
features.implementation_notes: Consolidated from SDK-001 to SDK-008. Single integration point for Claude API.

features.name: Trading Session Coordinators
features.description: Morning and evening session coordinators that orchestrate Claude's trading workflow. Manages session state, decision logging, and trade execution pipeline.
features.implementation_notes: Session coordinators with full workflow management

features.name: Manual Override API Endpoints
features.reason: System must be fully autonomous with no manual intervention
features.notes: All manual override features removed as system operates autonomously without human intervention

features.name: Manual Override State Management
features.reason: No manual override state needed in fully autonomous system
features.notes: Emergency stop and manual controls are anti-patterns for autonomous trading system

features.name: Distributed Job Queue System
features.reason: Over-engineering for single-user autonomous system. INFRA-008 (Three-Queue System) provides adequate async task handling.
features.notes: Celery/Redis distributed queue adds unnecessary complexity. Simple async queues sufficient for autonomous paper trading.

features.name: Advanced Learning Engine
features.reason: Over-engineering - Claude already has reasoning capabilities. PT-005 genetic algorithm handles strategy evolution.
features.notes: Separate ML/tensorflow pipeline redundant when Claude can analyze patterns directly.

features.name: Production Deployment Infrastructure
features.reason: Over-engineering - K8s, blue-green deployment unnecessary for single-user paper trading system.
features.notes: Simple Docker setup sufficient. No need for enterprise deployment patterns.

features.name: Performance Metrics Collection (Grafana/Prometheus)
features.reason: Over-engineering - enterprise monitoring unnecessary for single-user system.
features.notes: Basic logging sufficient. System health UI already exists.

feature_compliance.description: All features must serve the core purpose defined in PURPOSE.md

no_manual_intervention.rule: Never implement manual override features - system must be fully autonomous
no_manual_intervention.rationale: Manual intervention defeats the purpose of testing Claude's autonomous trading capability

no_real_money.rule: Never integrate with real payment systems or broker accounts for actual trading
no_real_money.rationale: System is paper trading only until Claude proves trustworthy performance

always_log_decisions.rule: Every trading decision must be logged with full context before execution
always_log_decisions.rationale: Essential for transparency, learning, and performance evaluation

separate_portfolios.rule: User's real portfolio and Claude's paper trading portfolio must remain completely separate
separate_portfolios.rationale: Prevents confusion and maintains clear evaluation of Claude's trading performance

system_purpose.portfolio_analysis: Analyze user's real portfolio stocks monthly using AI for keep/sell recommendations
system_purpose.paper_trading: Test Claude's trading capability autonomously with ₹1L virtual money
system_purpose.evaluation_goal: Determine if Claude can be trusted with real money based on performance

core_principles.fully_autonomous: No manual intervention or override features
core_principles.paper_trading_only: Never use real money - always virtual trading
core_principles.monthly_analysis: Analyze real portfolio monthly, not daily
core_principles.daily_trading: Paper trading operates daily with morning/evening sessions

success_metrics.trust_threshold: Performance score > 85/100 for real money consideration

infrastructure.notes: INFRA-018 (Grafana/Prometheus) removed - over-engineering. All INFRA features completed.

agent_systems.notes: Single Claude context with tools (multi-agent removed)

claude_agent_sdk.notes: Consolidated from 8 to 2: SDK Integration + Session Coordinators

paper_trading.notes: PT-001, PT-002, PT-003, PT-004, PT-007, PT-009 completed. Pending: PT-005, PT-006, PT-008, PT-010.

portfolio_analysis.notes: PA-001 (Monthly Analysis Engine) completed. PA-002 (Accuracy Tracker) pending.

summary.impact: Codebase now lean and focused on core functionality

known_issues: EventType.MORNING_SESSION_ERROR and MORNING_SESSION_COMPLETE missing from event_bus.py
Test mock service key naming mismatch (kite_service vs kite)

ui_tests.notes: Frontend loads successfully. AIAutomationControlPanel crash fixed with null coalescing. No automated browser tests configured.

action_items: Fix test mock service key naming consistency
Consider adding Playwright/Puppeteer for automated browser testing
